sections.title: Field Notes
sections.subtitle: Document observations, hazards, controls, or corrective actions.
sections.name: meta.notes

sections.title: Hot Work Permit
sections.html:
Permit Details:

Permit Number: [DATE]-[MISH##]-[SEQ]

Pre-work Conditions Checklist:

☐ Area inspected and cleared of combustibles

☐ Fire watch established and equipped

sections.title: Hot Work Permit (continued 2)
sections.html:
☐ Fire extinguisher readily available

☐ Proper ventilation ensured

☐ Flammable materials removed or protected

☐ Sprinkler systems protected from accidental activation

☐ Hot work equipment in good condition

sections.title: Hot Work Permit (continued 3)
sections.html:
☐ Adjacent areas checked for hazards

Work Authorization:

Work Description

Location

Start Time

End Time

Authorized By

Required Controls:

☐ Welding screens/barriers in place

sections.title: Hot Work Permit (continued 4)
sections.html:
☐ Proper grounding of equipment

☐ Adequate ventilation for fumes

☐ Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) utilized

☐ Standby personnel (if required)

☐ Post-work fire watch for 30 minutes

sections.title: Hot Work Permit (continued 5)
sections.html:
Atmospheric Testing Log (Hot Work):

Time

O2%

LEL%

CO ppm

H2S ppm

Tested By

Permit Closure:

Work completed: ___________ Area restored: ___________
